detail.instructions: Add timeout_seconds: Option<u64> to Config. Use None in Default.

hints.body: Option<T> represents a value that may be present or absent.
A timeout expressed in seconds can be a u64.
None is clearer than a magic value such as 0 when no timeout is configured.

detail.completionExplanation: Option makes absence part of the type instead of encoding it with a sentinel value. Callers must handle both configured and not-configured cases.
